title: senecio gossypinus
intro: Senecio gossypinus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio gossypinus are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Senecio gossypinus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
